{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Akura family crest
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura family crest]] consists of one great star flanked by two smaller stars over a mountain range.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The stars and mountains of the [[Akura]] family emblem glow purple.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
